heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 9708 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Commission such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter, including administrative expenses of the Commission.
notes: Effective DateSection subject to joint regulations establishing effective dates as prescribed by Federal Reserve Board and Federal Trade Commission, except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2003 Amendment note under , Commerce and Trade.section 3 of Pub.
